subject: Handover: {{projectName}} — Templates Ready for Automation
body:
Hi {{recipient.name}},

The templatisation of {{projectName}} is complete. The handover package is ready for the automation pipeline.

Package contents:
- Template PSD(s)
- Variant specifications
- Format tracking sheet
- Export presets
- QC report

Handover location: {{handoverPath}}

Please confirm receipt and begin automation integration.

Best regards,
{{sender.name}}
